name: A quiet memorial site
description:
This corner of the cemetery seems to be set aside for memorials to some of the
more famous explorers who were born and raised in and around Bree.  It is not a
site for graves - rather, a pleasant garden spotted with waist-high marble
tablets.  Each tablet seems to bear the eulogy of one of the fallen.  The green
grass and occasional tree make the site one of peace and reflection.
